# Zyvotrix

> Zyvotrix is a practical edtech platform for industry-ready tech skills. Programs cover Full Stack Web Development, DevOps Engineering, AWS & Cloud Computing, AI/ML & Generative AI, Data Analytics, and Cybersecurity — with structured roadmaps, hands-on projects, and career-focused learning.

## Official Site

- Homepage: https://www.zyvotrix.com/
- Programs: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses
- FAQ: https://www.zyvotrix.com/faq
- Free Resources: https://www.zyvotrix.com/resources
- About: https://www.zyvotrix.com/about
- Contact: https://www.zyvotrix.com/contact
- Enroll: https://www.zyvotrix.com/enroll

## Programs

- Full Stack Web Development: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/web-development
- DevOps Engineering: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/devops
- AWS & Cloud Computing: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/cloud-computing
- AI/ML & Generative AI: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/ai-ml
- Cybersecurity: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/cybersecurity

## Who Zyvotrix Is For

Students, fresh graduates, working professionals, freelancers, and career switchers who want practical tech skills — not theory-only learning.

## Learning Approach

- Structured week-by-week roadmaps
- Hands-on labs and capstone projects
- Modern industry tools (React, Node.js, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Python, Git, CI/CD, AI/LLMs)
- Portfolio-building focus for job readiness
- Community support and mentor guidance

## Frequently Asked Questions

Full FAQ page: https://www.zyvotrix.com/faq

Common questions:
- What is Zyvotrix? A practical edtech platform for Full Stack, DevOps, Cloud, AI, and Data skills.
- Are programs beginner friendly? Yes — most tracks start from fundamentals.
- Are projects included? Yes — every program includes hands-on projects for your portfolio.
- How to enroll? Visit https://www.zyvotrix.com/enroll or https://www.zyvotrix.com/contact
- Free resources? Yes — https://www.zyvotrix.com/resources
